DefaultBackground.name: Candy Heart
DefaultBackground.description: Heals you for 25% of your max health over 4 seconds when used

BloodHunterBackground.name: Black Hole
BloodHunterBackground.description: Creates a black hole that pulls in enemies for 8 seconds when used

BigGameHunterBackground.name: Binoculars
BigGameHunterBackground.description: Automatically marks bosses and has a 25% chance to mark enemies every 30 seconds

BigPictureThinkerBackground.name: Shackles
BigPictureThinkerBackground.description: Automatically stun bosses for 15 seconds when they spawn

BigFarterBackground.name: Magnet
BigFarterBackground.description: Pulls in all pickups when used

MagiTouchedBackground.name: Font of Magic
MagiTouchedBackground.description: Applies a random status effect to 10 random enemies when used

OptometristBackground.name: Hair Trigger
OptometristBackground.description: Attack 50% faster for 10 seconds when used

NerdjaminDorklinBackground.name: Cloud Seeder
NerdjaminDorklinBackground.description: Causes your cloud to create lightning when used

ExplosiveExpertBackground.name: Kamikaze
ExplosiveExpertBackground.description: Explodes and damages nearby enemies for 500% of your max health when used at the cost of 50% of your current health

PterodactylBackground.name: Handful of Bullets
PterodactylBackground.description: Double all follower projectiles for 10 seconds when used

TeacherBackground.name: Reading Time
TeacherBackground.description: Stop moving and attacking for 10 seconds but gain 1 level when used

SilverTonguePreacherBackground.name: Golden Mind
SilverTonguePreacherBackground.description: Enemies drop more knowledge when killed for 20 seconds when used

FixedSituationBackground.name: Emergency Shield
FixedSituationBackground.description: Gives a standard shield when used

GottaGoFastBackground.name: Adrenaline Rush
GottaGoFastBackground.description: Gain a speed boost for 5 seconds when used
